title: Behemoths
description: Behemoths is a expansion mod that aims to introduce massive threats, special gear, and a world-altering curse system. Designed for players who find the standard survival too easy.
body:
![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d348b8e5e164c201103ac596e471075878e75987_0.webp)

![RenderC1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0253175104446bfdf7c4c8b9972f03237b94720f_0.webp)

Behemoths is a expansion mod that aims to introduce massive threats, special gear, and a world-altering curse system. Designed for players who find the standard survival too easy.

**Join us in our Discord server:** [https://discord.gg/TFwrgKesWx](https://discord.gg/TFwrgKesWx)

![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d348b8e5e164c201103ac596e471075878e75987_0.webp)

## The Pandemonium Curses and Voting System

**Pandemonium Curses** are world-wide modifiers that make the game so much harder, and the **Pandemonium Voting System** is the "Democratic Apocalypse" that lets players decide which nightmare begins.

Achieving specific advancements (Configurable) or slaying specific entities (Configurable) instantly triggers the **Pandemonium Voting System**, prompting every single player in the world to participate in the voting process for a set amount of time (Configurable).

During the **Pandemonium Voting System**, a player may choose a single **Pandemonium Curse** out of the 3 available options given to them. By the end of the voting process, the curse with the highest amount of votes gets applied into the world permanently (If 2 or more curse candidates are equal, it selects a random curse among the options).

To check the curses the world has implemented, run the **/pandemonium curse list** command.

For world admins, you may use the rest of the **/pandemonium** command features to manually add/remove curses, start/stop voting processes, and more.

![voting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdc268e4f9e0a014adf1021e0d8b82f239ac04ff.png)

![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d348b8e5e164c201103ac596e471075878e75987_0.webp)

## The List of Monsters

**Archzombie**
> Classification: Behemoth

> Vanilla Counterpart: Zombie

> Description: The brute of the undead, often wielding iron weapons that deal lethal damage to unprepared players. Lurks at night, and doesn't burn under the scorching sun. The Archzombie would become significantly deadlier when riding a Banishing Stampede.

> ![arch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7996c51dc823a8ad22b188eb7d723a3f64dce36a.png)

**Banishing Stampede**

> Classification: Behemoth

> Vanilla Counterpart: Zombie Horse

> Description: It may be an undead, but it's completely passive. The Banishing Stampede powerful steed great for traversing the world once obtained. You can tame it like how you'd tame a regular horse, but be careful because it may throw you up in the sky when it doesn't like you. It must wear a Behemoth Saddle before it can be controlled by the player. When it senses an Archzombie nearby, it will move towards it if unridden even when tamed.

> ![stampede](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/413bf0dab9d05cb645cfc32aea1920bd9d1a1ca9.png)

**Hollowborne**

> Classification: Behemoth

> Vanilla Counterpart: Skeleton Horse

> Description: A neutral undead. It can be tamed with soul-related items when it's turret is shut down and it can be ridden by up to 5 players at a time when wearing a Behemoth Harness. It will take some attempts to successfully tame it, with each failed attempt to cause it to agitate, smashing the ground with a large AoE attack.

> ![Hollowborne](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be7123f03733dc5023618b30cfb6b7a28465968f.png)

**Hollowborne Turret**

> Classification: Behemoth

> Vanilla Counterpart: Skeleton

> Description: A deadly sharpshooter. It is a hostile entity controlling its Hollowborne body and it has a very far detection range. It can shoot barrages of heavy, painful massive arrows. Dies when its body dies and explodes when killed.

> ![Hollowborne Turret](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cffa4d533df3f37d5ccf1a43ecb1e8390ffe3fe8_0.webp)

![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d348b8e5e164c201103ac596e471075878e75987_0.webp)
